name: Abacus Group
analysis: ABG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.0250, stop A$0.9454, target A$1.1750 (1.89:1) — then trail it.
